zh.lifeSummary: 當George Hutchinson於大約1551年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Richard Hutchinson37歲，母親Margery Hulcott33歲。他於1586年9月5日與Jane Lowther在英國米德萊可聖 克萊門特 丹妮絲結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Hutchinson于大约1551年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Richard Hutchinson37岁，母亲Margery Hulcott33岁。他于1586年9月5日与Jane Lowther在英国米德萊可聖 克萊門特 丹妮絲结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Hutchinson was born about 1551, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Hutchinson, was 37 and his mother, Margery Hulcott, was 33. He married Jane Lowther on 5 September 1586, in St Clement Danes, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ko.Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운
ko.lifeSummary: George Hutchinson(이)가 대략 1551년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hutchinson(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Hulcott(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1586년 9월 5일 영국 미들레세스 스트 클레멘트 단아네스에서 Jane Lowther(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Hutchinson родился около 1551 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Hutchinson было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Hulcott, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Lowther 5 сентября 1586 г. в местности ст клемент данесь, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности чарльстоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
